---
title: "Publications"
comments: false
bibliography: publications.bib
csl: apa-with-annote.csl
nocite: "@*"
---

Below is a full list of my publications. For an always up-to-date list, visit my
[Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_ID).

> **To add your papers:** replace `publications.bib` with the BibTeX file exported from Google Scholar.  
> Add `annote = {One-sentence summary.},` inside any BibTeX entry to show a summary here.

::: {#refs}
:::
